# This directory holds the auto-generated OpenAPI spec.

#

# Generated by: make proto

# Output file: go_bank.swagger.json

#

# The spec is embedded into the Go binary at build time via //go:embed

# in gapi/swagger.go — no manual copying needed.

#

# DO NOT manually edit go_bank.swagger.json.

# Edit the .proto files and re-run `make proto` instead.
